treatment_information.treatment_response: Completed 6 days of ciprofloxacin with no recurrence of symptoms

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 20 mg Tablet, one Tablet PO daily

treatment_timeline.event: Patient underwent Segment III liver wedge resection for hepatocellular carcinoma
Admitted to outside hospital with urinary symptoms and diagnosed with UTI
Began treatment with ciprofloxacin for UTI
Discharged home with medication instructions including furosemide

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient is currently stable, appetite improved, bowel movements normal
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient advised to weigh daily and report significant weight changes
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient's wife states increased abdomen girth and fatigue, but patient minimizes these complaints
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient appears well but reports some complaints of fatigue and swelling
